ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with embedded invoice on page 2. Certificate is on page 1, page 2 is an embedded copy of the invoice within the certificate file.

invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. Invoice No. 830488 issued by Bulten Sweden AB. This is the separate invoice file (fil 2) used for verification per rule 8.5.0.

document_pairing.method: Certificate references Invoice No. 830488; separate invoice file contains Invoice No. 830488. Consignor Bulten Sweden AB matches invoice issuer. Pairing confirmed.
document_pairing.pairing_validation_details: Sanity check 8.6: (1) Certificate invoice reference 830488 matches invoice number 830488 — PASS. (2) Consignor Bulten Sweden AB identified in invoice footer and header — PASS. (3) Consignee Volvo Cars Chengdu identified in invoice Payer field — PASS. All three criteria met.

lc_check.lc_verification_details: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. Certificate number SEG-26D-445085 does not contain LC banking terminology. Normal verification applies.

Invoice footer: 'Bulten Sweden AB, Box 512, SE-734 27 Hallstahammar, Sweden'
Invoice header: BULTEN logo/branding at top of page

consignor.certificate_value: Bulten Sweden AB, Box 512, 734 27, Hallstahammar, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Bulten Sweden AB, Box 512, SE-734 27 Hallstahammar, Sweden (footer); BULTEN (header logo/branding)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Bulten Sweden AB' anywhere in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. 'Bulten Sweden AB' appears explicitly in the invoice footer at two addresses: (1) Box 9148, 400 93 Göteborg, Sweden; (2) Box 512, SE-734 27 Hallstahammar, Sweden. Also appears as 'BULTEN' branding in header.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignor 'Bulten Sweden AB' exactly matches invoice footer 'Bulten Sweden AB'.
Certificate: Sweden. Invoice footer: Sweden. Also VAT No SE556078364801 (SE prefix confirms Sweden). IBAN starts with SE.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice footer and header.
Land verified via explicit 'Sweden' in footer and SE-prefix in VAT number.

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Bulten Sweden AB, Box 512, 734 27, Hallstahammar, Sweden'. The invoice is issued by Bulten Sweden AB as shown in the header branding ('BULTEN') and the footer which lists two addresses for 'Bulten Sweden AB': Box 9148, Göteborg and Box 512, SE-734 27 Hallstahammar, Sweden. The second footer address exactly matches the certificate's consignor address. Country 'Sweden' is confirmed in the footer text and by VAT number prefix SE. Rule 4.1.0 gives MATCH since the consignor name is explicitly found in the invoice. Rule 4.1.4 land check passes.
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Bulten Sweden AB' is explicitly identified in the invoice footer (Box 512, SE-734 27 Hallstahammar, Sweden) and as the header branding entity. Country Sweden confirmed via footer text and VAT prefix SE. Exact name and country match.

consignee.certificate_value: Volvo Cars Chengdu, Zhongjia Automob Manufact. Ltd(764), No. 366, Checheng Eastern 7 road, Longquanyi District Chengdu, SICHUAN PROVINCE 610100, China
consignee.invoice_value: Payer: VOLVO CARS CHENGDU, ZHONGJIA AUTOMOBILE MANUFAC.LTD, No.368, Checheng Eastern 7 road, LongQuanyi district, Chengdu City, Sichuan Province; Delivery address: VOLVO CARS CHENGDU, Zhongjia Auto Manuf. Ltd (764-2CKR), No 366, CHECHENG EASTERN 7 ROAD, LONGQUANYI DISTRICT, CHENGDU, SICHUAN PROVINCE 610100 CHINA

comparison_steps.description: Invoice Payer field: 'VOLVO CARS CHENGDU, ZHONGJIA AUTOMOBILE MANUFAC.LTD'. Certificate: 'Volvo Cars Chengdu, Zhongjia Automob Manufact. Ltd(764)'. Comparing names.
comparison_steps.result: Primary party identified: VOLVO CARS CHENGDU matches exactly. Second line differs: cert='Zhongjia Automob Manufact. Ltd(764)' vs invoice payer='ZHONGJIA AUTOMOBILE MANUFAC.LTD'. Analyzing further.

comparison_steps.description: Comparing 'Zhongjia Automob Manufact. Ltd(764)' (cert) vs 'ZHONGJIA AUTOMOBILE MANUFAC.LTD' (invoice payer). After case normalization: 'zhongjia automob manufact. ltd(764)' vs 'zhongjia automobile manufac.ltd'. The differences: (1) 'Automob' vs 'Automobile' — cert appears truncated (layout avkortning of 'Automobile' to 'Automob'); (2) 'Manufact.' vs 'Manufac.' — cert has 'Manufact.' which is slightly longer abbreviation of 'Manufacturing/Manufacturer'; (3) '(764)' in cert vs absent in payer but present as '(764-2CKR)' in delivery address.
comparison_steps.result: Applying 4.1.3.2 (layout truncation) for consignee per 4.2.2.1.1: 'Automob' is a prefix of 'Automobile', 'Manufact.' is a prefix/abbreviation variant of 'Manufacturing'. These are layout-driven abbreviations. The '(764)' parenthetical is a reference code, not part of the legal entity name. VOLVO CARS CHENGDU matches exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignee country: China. Invoice Payer address: 'Sichuan Province' (China). Invoice Delivery address: 'SICHUAN PROVINCE 610100 CHINA'. China explicitly stated.

Primary name 'VOLVO CARS CHENGDU' matches exactly. Secondary name 'Zhongjia Automob Manufact. Ltd' is a layout-truncated version of 'ZHONGJIA AUTOMOBILE MANUFAC.LTD'. Country China matches. Street address difference (No. 366 in cert vs No.368 in payer) is per rule 4.2.4 not grounds for MISMATCH — only company name and country matter. Delivery address also shows No 366 matching cert.

rules_applied.description: Payer field used as primary consignee identification.
Layout truncation: 'Automob' is prefix of 'Automobile', 'Manufact.' is abbreviation variant. Accepted under layout truncation rules.
Country China matches between certificate and invoice.
Address differences (No. 366 vs No. 368) do not affect MATCH — only company name and country are determinative.

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Volvo Cars Chengdu, Zhongjia Automob Manufact. Ltd(764), No. 366, Checheng Eastern 7 road, Longquanyi District Chengdu, SICHUAN PROVINCE 610100, China'. Invoice Payer field: 'VOLVO CARS CHENGDU, ZHONGJIA AUTOMOBILE MANUFAC.LTD, No.368, Checheng Eastern 7 road, LongQuanyi district, Chengdu City, Sichuan Province'. The primary name 'VOLVO CARS CHENGDU' is an exact match (case-insensitive). The secondary name 'Zhongjia Automob Manufact. Ltd' vs 'ZHONGJIA AUTOMOBILE MANUFAC.LTD': 'Automob' is a clear prefix/layout truncation of 'Automobile' and 'Manufact.' is a slightly longer abbreviation of the same root as 'Manufac.' — both are layout-driven abbreviations per 4.2.2.1.1. The parenthetical '(764)' is a facility/plant code, not part of the legal name. Country is China in both. Street address No. 366 (cert) vs No.368 (payer) — per rule 4.2.4, address differences do not cause MISMATCH. The delivery address also confirms No 366. MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Primary consignee name 'Volvo Cars Chengdu' matches exactly (case-insensitive). Secondary entity name 'Zhongjia Automob Manufact. Ltd' is a layout-abbreviated form of 'ZHONGJIA AUTOMOBILE MANUFAC.LTD' — 'Automob' is a prefix of 'Automobile' and 'Manufact.' an abbreviation variant. Country China confirmed. Address differences do not affect the result per rule 4.2.4.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH due to 'Automob' vs 'Automobile' being different words
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 4.2.2.1.1 (layout truncation), 'Automob' is an exact prefix of 'Automobile' truncated due to field length limitation in certificate. All conditions for layout truncation are met: prefix match, obvious layout constraint, no other party, country matches.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH due to street number 366 vs 368
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 4.2.4, differences in street address do not cause MISMATCH — only company name and country are determinative. Additionally, the delivery address field confirms No 366.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate does not contain explicit article numbers (no customer or supplier article numbers). The 'stat no 73181499' is a customs statistical number, not an article number. No article number verification required via Priority 1.
comparison_steps.result: Not applicable — no article numbers in certificate.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning: 'Screws, other self-tapping (TT, PT, RF)'. Searching for this exact text in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. Invoice line item description contains 'Screws, other self-tapping (TT, PT, RF)' — exact textual match after case normalization.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate also contains '1 pallets fasteners' (package description) and 'stat no 73181499' (customs statistical number). Invoice contains 'M8x25 FL-SCREW TT2000 Y 100-4' (additional product specification) and 'Customs Stat No 73181499'. The customs stat number 73181499 matches. The additional descriptions are non-identity-bearing per 4.3.4.
comparison_steps.result: No MISMATCH from additional text. Customs stat number confirms same product category.

rules_applied.description: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Screws, other self-tapping (TT, PT, RF)' found exactly in invoice.
Additional text (package info, customs stat no) are non-identity-bearing and do not cause MISMATCH.

goods_description.debug_explanation: The certificate describes goods as '1 pallets fasteners, Screws, other self-tapping (TT, PT, RF), stat no 73181499'. The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning is 'Screws, other self-tapping (TT, PT, RF)'. The invoice line item description includes exactly 'Screws, other self-tapping (TT, PT, RF)' — this is a verbatim text match after case normalization. The customs statistical number 73181499 also matches between both documents. Additional descriptions in the invoice ('M8x25 FL-SCREW TT2000 Y 100-4') are specifications that do not change product identity per 4.3.4. MATCH.
goods_description.motivation: The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Screws, other self-tapping (TT, PT, RF)' is found verbatim in the invoice description. Customs statistical number 73181499 also matches. Additional product specifications in the invoice are non-identity-bearing.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 states '3900pcs'. Numeric value: 3900. Unit: pcs. Both present.
Box 7 contains '3900pcs'. This is the verification-grounding quantity.
comparison_steps.result: 3900 pcs is the value to verify.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 3900 pcs. Invoice line item Quantity column: '3900 PCS'. Numeric value 3900 matches exactly. Unit PCS matches.

rules_applied.description: Förekomstkontroll: numeric value 3900 found in invoice quantity column.
Both numeric value and unit present in certificate.

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '3900pcs'. Invoice quantity column states '3900 PCS'. Numeric value 3900 matches exactly. Unit PCS/pcs matches. Direct förekomstkontroll succeeds without need for any exceptions (3A-3E). MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity 3900 pcs is exactly matched by invoice quantity 3900 PCS. Direct identification in invoice without any calculation or summation required.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice line item has a column labeled 'Origin' containing 'SE'. SE is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden.
Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'SE'. Normalization: 'Sweden' = 'SE' (ISO alpha-2 code). Standard land name normalization.

rules_applied.description: Land name normalization: Sweden = SE (ISO alpha-2).

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'Sweden' as country of origin. The invoice has an 'Origin' column on the line item showing 'SE'. SE is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden. Per rule 4.5.4, full country name vs ISO code normalization is permitted. Sweden = SE. MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate origin 'Sweden' verified against invoice origin column 'SE' (ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden). Standard normalization applied.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No LC reference found in certificate. Certificate number SEG-26D-445085 does not constitute an LC reference.

Certificate file (Document A) page 1 is the certificate. Invoice file (Document B) page 1 is the invoice. Invoice No. 830488 matches in both. Certificate page 2 contains an embedded invoice copy — this is NOT the verification invoice per rule 8.5.0.
All three criteria met: (1) Invoice ref 830488 matches, (2) Consignor Bulten Sweden AB found in invoice, (3) Consignee Volvo Cars Chengdu found in invoice.
Bulten Sweden AB found in invoice footer (two addresses) and header branding.
Sweden (cert) = Sweden (invoice footer) = SE prefix in VAT.
Payer field 'VOLVO CARS CHENGDU / ZHONGJIA AUTOMOBILE MANUFAC.LTD' identified as primary consignee.
'Automob' is prefix of 'Automobile', 'Manufact.' is abbreviation variant of 'Manufac.' — layout-driven truncation accepted.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignee address difference not grounds for MISMATCH
rule_evaluation_log.details: Street number 366 vs 368 difference ignored per rule — only company name and country are determinative.
'Screws, other self-tapping (TT, PT, RF)' found verbatim in invoice.
Additional text in both documents (package info, customs stat no, product specs) are non-identity-bearing.
Sweden (cert) normalized to SE (ISO alpha-2), matching invoice origin 'SE'.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Bulten Sweden AB, mottagaren Volvo Cars Chengdu, varubeskrivningen (skruvar, självgängande), kvantiteten 3900 stycken och ursprungslandet Sverige kan alla verifieras i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) verified as MATCH. Certificate No. SEG-26D-445085 with Invoice No. 830488 form a consistent and verifiable document pair.
non_blocking_notes: Certificate page 2 contains an embedded copy of the invoice — verification performed against the separate invoice file (Document B) per rule 8.5.0.
Consignee name uses abbreviated forms in certificate ('Automob', 'Manufact.') — accepted via layout truncation rule 4.2.2.1.1.
Street number differs (No. 366 in cert vs No. 368 in invoice payer field) — not grounds for MISMATCH per rule 4.2.4; delivery address confirms No. 366.
